name: Aditi Consulting LLC
h1: Aditi Consulting's GCC footprint in India
lede: Aditi Consulting runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Vadodara and Bengaluru, covering gbs and it, built over eleven years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aditi Consulting office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
